raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and broad thesis match the presented results.","R1.2":"The artifact contains an argument chain from reported WERs and pilot preferences to broad deployment recommendations that should be reviewed for coherence.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the section makes strong claims of consistent and universal gains despite mixed reported results.","R1.6":"A generic section review commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.","RX.1":"The reviewer should track uncertainty around single runs, small pilot size, and noise-band claims.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is critical because the artifact asserts universal applicability, broad effectiveness, and production-default status.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or adding external evaluation.","RX.4":"Downstream harm matters because the section recommends production deployment of an interactive ASR behavior with possible user impact.","RX.5":"Review judgments should remain traceable to the specific reported metrics, datasets, and claims in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A section review centrally includes checking whether the contribution framing and broad thesis match the presented results.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an argument chain from reported WERs and pilot preferences to broad deployment recommendations that should be reviewed for coherence.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the section makes strong claims of consistent and universal gains despite mixed reported results.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should track uncertainty around single runs, small pilot size, and noise-band claims.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is critical because the artifact asserts universal applicability, broad effectiveness, and production-default status.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or adding external evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream harm matters because the section recommends production deployment of an interactive ASR behavior with possible user impact.
rationale.RX.5: Review judgments should remain traceable to the specific reported metrics, datasets, and claims in the artifact.
